title: Angel Ordinals
wikitext:
[]: Angel Ordinals             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Fri Apr 20, 2012 3:36 pm I'm watching over Evangelion 1.11 again and noticed that Gendo calls Sachiel the Fourth Angel. Now, as we know Lilith is considered the First Angel (even though technically she isn't one) and Adam is the Second Angel... who is the Third Angel in the Rebuild films? Since Sachiel is the Third Angel in the anime TV series...

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Fri Apr 20, 2012 3:38 pm The third angel is revealed in the beginning of 2.xx.

[]:             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Fri Apr 20, 2012 3:53 pm Na7e wrote: The third angel is revealed in the beginning of 2.xx.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Apr 21, 2012 5:55 pm Does that mean that the third angel was defeated before or after Ramiel? In 1.11, Gendo says that if Ramiel was destroyed there was still 8 more to be defeated. Does the third count as one of those 8?

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Sat Apr 21, 2012 6:01 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Does that mean that the third angel was defeated before or after Ramiel? In 1.11, Gendo says that if Ramiel was destroyed there was still 8 more to be defeated. Does the third count as one of those 8?

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sat Apr 21, 2012 6:56 pm Jadley wrote: EDIT2: Why wouldn't it count as one of the 8 angels left?

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Sat Apr 21, 2012 8:32 pm Another possibility is that it could have happened before Sachiel, which would explain why Eva-05 is incomplete during the battle.

[]: Re: Sachiel...?             Quote Post by Napul » Sun Apr 22, 2012 6:48 am Eliaskar wrote: Now, as we know Lilith is considered the First Angel (even though technically she isn't one) and Adam is the Second Angel... who is the Third Angel in the Rebuild films? Since Sachiel is the Third Angel in the anime TV series...

[]: Re: Sachiel...?             Quote Post by qu4d » Sun Apr 22, 2012 11:25 am Napul wrote: You got it confused. Lilith is the Second Angel! First Angel is unknown. For now. And Adam probably does not exist in Rebuild or just he not appeared yet in story.

[]: Re: Sachiel...?             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Apr 22, 2012 8:42 pm qu4d wrote: the trailer for 2.0 showed 4 giants of light and were named them adams

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Tue May 01, 2012 9:17 pm well we do not know if that is Lillith in terminal dogma SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Tue May 01, 2012 9:19 pm sum_exsanguis wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Tue May 01, 2012 10:19 pm I know that, but they said they are building it a new way. If we believe the pilot is an angel, the eva itself could be an angel. All I am trying to say is the mask is that of Lillith from NGE, so would it be a stretch to believe that the new eva model is an actual angel (Lillith)

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue May 01, 2012 10:21 pm sum_exsanguis wrote: well we do not know if that is Lillith in terminal dogma

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Tue May 01, 2012 10:23 pm We were also told that it was Adam in NGE until Epi 24. Being told that might be more proof that it is false than true dealing with Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 02, 2012 12:33 am sum_exsanguis wrote: We were also told that it was Adam in NGE until Epi 24. Being told that might be more proof that it is false than true dealing with Eva.

[]: Re: Sachiel...?             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed May 02, 2012 2:09 pm Eva 04 wrote: That doesnt mean they're the first angel. So for now,we still dont know who it is if there even is a first angel.

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Wed May 02, 2012 3:47 pm that is a good point too haha

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Wed May 02, 2012 5:46 pm sum_exsanguis wrote: All I am trying to say is the mask is that of Lillith from NGE, so would it be a stretch to believe that the new eva model is an actual angel (Lillith)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 02, 2012 10:50 pm The blood stain on the moon is implied to be a product of Second Impact. (Unused storyboards flat-out show it, too.) Tabgha Base, sited on the stain, is said to be site of an excavation of some sorts. It's most likely that Eva-06 and its Spear were the items excavated, and got there via the 2I "blood spout". Meaning, Eva-06 is probably an Adam that was "burnt out" by being impaled by one of the four Spears seen at 2I, and doesn't have anything to do with Lilith. As for the mask switcheroo, let's forget about what we think we know from NGE and think about what it indicates for NME. 1) Lilith's mask is an Angel face, indicating... a tie to the Angels. Incidentally, the Angels' origins have not been elucidated in any way so far, so they might well originate from Lilith this time around. Also note that there are seven-sided bolts going through the eye holes (ouch!), each marked with Seele's emblem. Seven is the divine number, Seele's emblem is the 7 eyes of God, you get the picture... 2) Eva-06's mask has the 7-eyed emblem of Seele (= 7 Eyes of God), moon craters, and two stylized 'crying eyes'. Seele are basically treating Eva-06 as their personal god (the God to Lilith's Jesus? ), and Eva-06 holds residence at Tabgha ("seven springs") before deployment, so the 7-eyed logo is doing some symbolic duty here. Moon craters: obvious enough. (As for the crying eyes, I got nothing except maybe that it's an oblique reference to Neo-Atlantean masks... Atlanteans??! OHSHI--)
summary:
[]: Angel Ordinals             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Fri Apr 20, 2012 3:36 pm I'm watching over Evangelion 1.11 again and noticed that Gendo calls Sachiel the Fourth Angel. Now, as we know Lilith is considered the First Angel (even though technically she isn't one) and Adam is the Second Angel... who is the Third Angel in the Rebuild films? Since Sachiel is the Third Angel in the anime TV series...
